channel.title: Services on Cottage Painter
channel.description: Recent content in Services on Cottage Painter

item.title: Exterior Painting
item.description:
I offer modern, efficient, large-scale exterior painting. Modern; I use the most modern equipment and tools as the basis of my process. Efficient; my process is effective and practiced. Large-scale; my process can handle any size job on the Bay.

Process

  1. Estimation
  2. Washing
  3. Preparation
  4. Painting
  5. Cleanup

Estimation

I derive my price from two numbers:

  1. The estimated number of days it will take to complete the job
  2. The estimated number of gallons of paint required

I generate estimates with the Invoice Manager app and send them to the client either via email or text.
